downstream_risk: None -- run_benchmark.py and chart.py are new leaf modules with no existing importers. No changes to any already-merged, already-tested module (pipeline.py, metrics.py, cost_latency.py, llm_judge.py, traversal_precision.py, baselines/*) -- zero regression risk to their existing passing test suites.
test_impact: New test files only (test_run_benchmark.py, test_chart.py). No existing test file touched.
dependency_impact: None -- no new third-party dependency added to agents/pyproject.toml. chart.py uses stdlib only (text/data-table renderer).
runtime_impact: None in this pass -- run_benchmark.py's CLI is buildable/wireable but is not executed against a real corpus or real paid API in this implementation pass. Zero live network calls made during implementation or its own test suite.
